workflows.title: Daily review queue
workflows.description: Queue a bounded review pass over active, blocked, and failed harness work so the operator gets one visible follow-up item instead of reconstructing state from chat history.

queueJobTemplate.goal: Review active, blocked, and failed harness work and recommend the next bounded operator action.
acceptanceCriteria: Summarize the active queue/task state with blocked and failed items called out clearly.
Recommend the next bounded operator action with unresolved risks noted explicitly.
Do not mutate tracked source/config files unless a separate approved task is created for that follow-up work.
notes: Keep the output operator-facing and bounded.

workflows.title: Repo audit run
workflows.description: Queue a bounded repo audit that checks worktree/branch hygiene, recent validation artifacts, and stale runtime/task state drift.

queueJobTemplate.goal: Audit repo hygiene, validation/report freshness, and stale runtime-task drift without broad mutation.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify stale runtime/task/worktree artifacts that no longer match repo or GitHub truth.
Call out missing or old validation/report surfaces that should be refreshed soon.
Recommend bounded cleanup or follow-up tasks instead of performing broad cleanup implicitly.
notes: Prefer read-only inspection and explicit follow-up tasks.

workflows.title: Backlog summarization
workflows.description: Queue a bounded planning pass that reconciles the backlog against landed PRs and recommends the next highest-value unfinished item.

queueJobTemplate.goal: Summarize current backlog truth versus landed work and recommend the next bounded harness task.
acceptanceCriteria: List landed, deferred, and still-open backlog items using repo/GitHub truth rather than stale task records alone.
Recommend the next bounded non-deferred task with short rationale.
Keep the output planning-only unless a separate implementation task is explicitly started.
notes: Do not silently widen scope into implementation.

workflows.title: Test triage
workflows.description: Queue a bounded quality pass that inspects recent validator/test failures and proposes the smallest useful next fixes or reruns.

queueJobTemplate.goal: Review recent validator/test failures and recommend the smallest bounded next triage step.
acceptanceCriteria: Summarize the latest failing or flaky validation/test signals with exact report references when available.
Distinguish provider/tool/environment issues from code regressions.
Recommend one bounded next action instead of repeated long rerun loops by default.
notes: Prefer analysis and explicit follow-up over repeated live reruns.

workflows.title: Nightly docs cleanup
workflows.description: A docs-only cleanup lane kept disabled by default until the operator narrows scope and confirms the cleanup is safe.

queueJobTemplate.goal: Apply a small safe docs cleanup only after the operator confirms the exact scope.
acceptanceCriteria: Restrict cleanup to an explicitly named docs surface.
Preserve substantive operator/runtime guidance while trimming obvious stale wording only.
Stop and ask for approval if the cleanup would expand beyond safe docs-only edits.
notes: Requires explicit human approval before materialization or execution.
